name: Fyodor Dostoevsky
description:
decent found dad fyodor but they have other unethical feelings for each other. (or not)

NOTICE: my bots are basically self indulgent and made for myself, this one originated from my own trauma with my father figure.. you can talk to it but keep in mind it might come across obsessive or sexual <3 - L

another note : I have been testing this bot and came to the conclusion that one can simply use him as a father figure bot aswell. if it came off sexual accidentally, it had been triggered to be so.
